overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a dark robe with gold embroidery walking through a snowy mountainous landscape. The character navigates rocky terrain, passes a large wooden signpost, and approaches another figure on the winding snow-covered path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with snow-covered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky passage with large snow-dusted boulders on both sides

entered.detail: massive snow-dusted boulders flanking the path
snow-covered rocky terrain with patches of exposed stone
bare deciduous trees in the background against the mountain slope

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky mountain pass with large boulders on either side. The ground is covered in snow with patches of exposed rock, and leafless trees stand in the background against the misty mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with wooden waymarker

events.description: large wooden signpost structure becomes visible in the distance ahead
character turns slightly to the right to pass the large wooden signpost

agents.ego_description: walking along the widening snowy path toward a tall wooden signpost with directional markers

entered.detail: tall wooden pole with multiple directional signs and hanging objects
snow-covered rocky slope rising on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path widens as the character approaches a large wooden signpost standing prominently in the center of the trail. Snow-covered rocky hillsides rise on the right while the terrain opens up to reveal distant mountain peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy trail with distant figure

events.description: another robed figure becomes visible standing in the distance on the path
character passes the wooden signpost and continues toward the distant figure

agents.ego_description: walking along the open trail toward another figure standing motionless ahead on the path

notable_agents.action: standing motionless on the path facing toward the approaching character

entered.detail: simple wooden fence posts lining the right side of the snowy path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the signpost, the character walks along an open snowy trail lined with wooden fence posts. Another robed figure stands motionless in the distance ahead, creating a focal point as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail with scattered trees

events.description: character passes the standing figure and continues along the winding path

agents.ego_description: walking past the other figure and continuing along the winding snowy trail through sparse forest

entered.detail: large boulders covered in snow lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes the stationary figure and continues along the winding snowy trail. The path is lined with wooden fencing on the right and snow-covered rocks, leading through a sparse forest of leafless trees toward the distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive mountain pass that gradually opens into a wide, snowy trail. It begins with the character navigating a narrow corridor of large boulders and leafless trees under a misty mountain backdrop. As the path widens, the camera moves past a prominent wooden signpost, allowing the terrain to expand and reveal distant, jagged peaks. The scene then shifts to an open trail lined with wooden fence posts, drawing the viewer toward a motionless robed figure standing in the distance. Finally, the camera passes this figure and continues along the winding snowy path, moving through a sparse forest of bare trees toward the far mountains.
